component.name: GDrive Sync
component.summary: Bidirectional Google Drive synchronization for GNOME
Sincronizzazione bidirezionale con Google Drive per GNOME
Synchronisation bidirectionnelle avec Google Drive pour GNOME

description.p: GDrive Sync keeps a local folder synchronized with your Google Drive. Files live on your disk, so every application can use them; a background service propagates changes in both directions using rclone.

GDrive Sync mantiene una cartella locale sincronizzata con Google Drive. I file restano sul disco, utilizzabili da qualsiasi applicazione; un servizio in background propaga le modifiche in entrambe le direzioni tramite rclone.

GDrive Sync maintient un dossier local synchronisé avec Google Drive. Les fichiers restent sur le disque, utilisables par toute application ; un service en arrière-plan propage les modifications dans les deux sens via rclone.
The Drive folder selection can now be changed after setup from the account preferences; applying a change realigns the synchronization automatically.
Fix the first synchronization of a new account failing when bisync state from a removed account or a previous installation was still on disk.

Setup wizard reworked: the first page only connects the Google account; a new page shows the Drive folders as a checkbox tree with per-folder sizes, so several folders can be selected for synchronization. The interface is now translated (English, French, Italian) following the system language.
Multiple Google accounts; the first sync runs in the background service and closing the setup window offers to continue it in the background.
Initial sync progress bar with on-demand details; pick the Drive folder to synchronize by browsing it.
